abilities.name: Don't Mind Me (12)
abilities.description: If no offensive actions last turn or first round not acted, enemies TN 12 Scrutiny or choose different target.

abilities.name: Slink Away
abilities.description: Gain + to Defense against disengaging strikes. If friendly engaged, enemy cannot make disengaging strikes vs this.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores terrain penalties when taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Hunting Knife (Melee) | AV: 4 (10) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage.

(1) Quick-Draw Hold-Out Pistol (Pistol) | AV: 4 (10) | Rg: z6 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/3 damage. Ready as (0). Gains + to attack, target cannot declare Defensive Triggers. Capacity 4, Reload 2.
system.notes: Paranoid operatives moving stolen Soulstones through checkpoints. Use hidden compartments, bribery, magic. Caught = death. Exceptionally cautious.
